testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: 'Start learning' message not displayed expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: 'Start learning' message not displayed expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepDefinition.AllCoursesSteps.user_should_see_no_courses_message(AllCoursesSteps.java:42) at ✽.user should see the no courses message(file:///C:/Users/preet/Documents/Udemy_CG_Sprint/src/test/java/features/all_courses.feature:29)
